name: greenscape-plant-library
description: Greenscape's browser-based plant library, project list, and mood board tool.

scripts.lint: node --check assets/js/app.js && node --check assets/js/data.js && node --check assets/js/quotation.js && node --check assets/js/boq.js && node --check assets/js/boq-enhancements.js && node --check assets/js/project-costing.js
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run audit
